query:
DELETE FROM accessLogs WHERE 
  ipAddress IN ('::ffff:127.0.0.1', '127.0.0.1', '::1')
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%googlebot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%bingbot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%slurp%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%duckduckbot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%baiduspider%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%yandexbot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%applebot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%semrushbot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%ahrefsbot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%mj12bot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%dotbot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%petalbot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%bytespider%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%gptbot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%claudebot%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%anthropic%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%python-requests%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%go-http-client%'
  OR LOWER(userAgent) LIKE '%facebookexternalhit%'
  OR userAgent IS NULL
  OR LENGTH(userAgent) < 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RGrk2thZYC4WY66.root --database Unzs4ztvsFWb6bAqqUL6Mc --execute
